judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual element, a single newspaper clipping pasted onto a page, but Description B adds specific quoted text (headline, date) that Description A omits, without any contradiction.
original_image_tags: A single, aged, off-white document page. The majority of the page is blank. A small newspaper clipping is affixed to the lower-left quadrant. A small, handwritten checkmark in dark ink is visible in the lower-right area.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A black-and-white newspaper clipping dated “Monday, July 7, 1947,” headed “RADIO-GUIDED, SAYS LAD,” with several columns of printed text about flying saucers.*
